name: ventia-monorepo
description: VentIA Monorepo - Next.js Frontend + FastAPI Backend

scripts.dev: concurrently -n frontend,backend,messaging,sidekiq -c blue,green,magenta,yellow "pnpm dev:frontend" "pnpm dev:backend" "pnpm dev:messaging" "pnpm dev:sidekiq"
scripts.dev:backend: cd apps/backend && uv run uvicorn app.main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --log-level info
scripts.dev:messaging: cd apps/messaging && rbenv exec bundle exec rails server -p 3001
scripts.dev:sidekiq: cd apps/messaging && rbenv exec bundle exec sidekiq -C config/sidekiq.yml
scripts.db:migrate: cd apps/backend && uv run alembic upgrade head
scripts.db:migrate:create: cd apps/backend && uv run alembic revision --autogenerate -m
scripts.db:migrate:messaging: cd apps/messaging && rbenv exec bundle exec rails db:migrate
scripts.db:seed: cd apps/backend && uv run python scripts/seed.py

author: VentIA Team
